title: Crunchy Romantic Australian Digestive Biscuit Crumble
description: This recipe combines the classic flavor of digestive biscuits with a spicy, crunchy crumble topping for a delightful and romantic twist on an everyday dessert.

ingredients.name: 1 cup crushed digestive biscuits
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are finely ground for better mixing.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
ingredients.notes: Use room temperature for easier spreading.

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon
ingredients.notes: To enhance the biscuit texture and flavor.

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the crushed digestive biscuits and sugar until well combined.
Stir in the melted butter, cinnamon, and salt. Mix thoroughly until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
Press the biscuit crumble mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish lined with parchment paper for easy removal.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Cool slightly before serving with a dollop of whipped cream, if desired.
